data.content: Plan attached as note. Fix path: in run_ls_paginated (src/run_commands.rs), fetch full app.list_knots(), apply listing::apply_filters with the complete KnotListFilter, set total = filtered.len(), then slice by offset/limit. Delete dead app::list_knots_paginated, db::list_knot_hot_paginated, ListHotParams, count_knot_hot_filtered, build_hot_where. Tests: extract a small filter+slice helper and unit-test it (listing_tests_ext.rs); add CLI integration tests in tests/cli_dispatch.rs covering tag-filtered pagination stability across offsets, --limit 1 yielding exactly one match, total = filtered count, and --state shipped paginated regression. Verify with the repro command and make sanity. Risks: full-Vec scan replaces SQL LIMIT/OFFSET — same cost as the existing run_ls_full path, hot table is bounded by cold sweep.
